title: chelonopsis chekiangensis var. chekiangensis
intro: Chelonopsis chekiangensis var. chekiangensis, also known as Chekiang Lizard's Tail, is a plant species within the genus Chelonopsis in the family Gentianaceae. This plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Chelonopsis chekiangensis var. chekiangensis include relief from respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, as well as potential anti-cancer properties. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and then used in teas or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
